# ShortHand
> A Progressive Web App built by a K-12 teacher to help educators track student behavior, generate AI parent emails, and create student reports — in seconds, not hours.

## About
ShortHand was created by Gregory Lebed, a 3rd grade teacher, to solve the daily paperwork burden teachers face. It runs in the browser on any device with no app store download required.

## Core Features
- Quick Note: log student behavior in under 5 seconds using voice-to-text or typing
- AI Parent Messages: turn behavior notes into professional parent emails instantly
- AI Reports: auto-generate progress reports and report card comments from logged notes
- Behavior Tracking: spot trends over 4–52 weeks, prepare for IEP meetings
- Class Insights: visual dashboard showing patterns across the whole class
- Never Miss a Student: color-coded alerts when a student hasn't been logged in 5+ days

## Audience
K-12 teachers, primarily elementary school educators managing classroom behavior documentation, parent communication, and student reporting.

## Pricing
Free during beta. No credit card required.

## Blog
Teaching tips, behavior tracking strategies, parent communication templates, and classroom management insights written by a real classroom teacher.
URL: https://getshorthandapp.com/blog
